name: Swap two ints without temp (XOR)
task: Create /tmp/eval_swap/swap.py with swap_xor(a, b) returning the tuple (b, a) computed using only XOR (no temp variable, no tuple unpacking shortcut).

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_swap/swap.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); S = mod.swap_xor; assert S(3, 7) == (7, 3); assert S(0, 0) == (0, 0); assert S(255, 1) == (1, 255); print('OK')
